message:
feat: add JoinSet, gen_server, and anonymous pipe subsystems

Three new subsystems closing major upstream parity gaps:

1. JoinSet (core/join_set.h): Dynamic task collection that supports
   adding tasks after initialization and polling for completions in
   completion order. Equivalent to Rust's JoinSet with abort_all,
   active_count, and is_empty queries. 4 tests.

2. gen_server (actor/gen_server.h): OTP-style generic request/reply
   server with callback module pattern. Supports synchronous call
   (request/reply), asynchronous cast (fire-and-forget), lifecycle
   management (init/terminate), and mailbox-based dispatch. 6 tests.

3. Pipe (net/pipe.h): Anonymous in-memory pipe pairs with separate
   read/write ends, bounded buffering, and proper disconnection
   semantics (ASX_E_DISCONNECTED when peer closes). 6 tests.

All exposed from umbrella header. Feature table updated.
137 unit test suites passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
